examples: Symptoms of anaemia include general fatigue and lassitude.
Sometimes we feel lassitude onahot summer day.
Her courage was lowered to zero by her physical lassitude.
The motorcyclists fled, and subsequently complained of physical ailments, headaches and lassitude in the limbs.
And we must have the courage to stop making excuses for educational mediocrity, disinterest and lassitude among students and parents.
